# Changelog All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file, in reverse chronological order by release. ## 1.0.3 Add `source` link in composer.json. No code changes. ## 1.0.2 Allow PSR-7 (psr/http-message) 2.0. No code changes. ## 1.0.1 Allow installation with PHP 8. No code changes. ## 1.0.0 First stable release. No changes since 0.3.0. ## 0.3.0 Added Interface suffix on exceptions ## 0.2.0 All exceptions are in `Psr\Http\Client` namespace ## 0.1.0 First release
